Document:
# Synthanol
Synthanol is the name of a compound that was created as a non-toxic alternative to ethanol, lacking all of its addictive and negative health effects, providing a temporary stimulation without long-term intoxication and loss of dexterity.
Despite supposedly tasting and smelling near-identical to "real" alcohol, many drinkers still prefer the genuine article and the drinks never took off as a safe alternative in the mainstream.
However, these days Synthanol is most well-known for having a near-identical intoxicative effect on Synthetic Lifeforms, such as I.P.C.s, many of which either have heightened alcohol tolerances or alcohol immunity owed to their synthetic nature.
## Using Synthanol
As a Bartender, you can serve Synthanol-based drinks to [bold]both[/bold] Organic and Synthetic lifeforms.
In your [color=yellow]Booze Dispenser[/color] you should be able to find staple Synthanol-based drinks.
While [bold]Cargo can restock these[/bold] through the Booze Dispenser restock, they can also be made with the help of a [color=cyan]Chemist[color] in a pinch.
